summary: Completed frontend-only validation of v1 open-source improvements on public preview URL and repository artifacts. All requested runtime flows passed for caption language switching (English/Hindi), Accessibility Mode behavior, keyboard shortcuts, transcript/search interactions, and sign overlay modes. Release polish files and smoke build/test scripts are present and passing.
action_items: Optional maintainability follow-up: split /app/frontend/src/App.css (753 lines) into smaller focused style modules to improve long-term maintainability.
Optional packaging follow-up: verify published package entrypoints target built artifacts (dist) if npm consumers are expected to consume compiled JS rather than raw TS source.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking functional defects were found in requested v1 frontend behaviors.
File size guideline breach: /app/frontend/src/App.css exceeds 700 lines.
Open-source docs and release-smoke checks are present and currently aligned with requested English/Hindi + Accessibility Mode messaging.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://caption-player-demo.preview.emergentagent.com (from frontend/.env). Verified button + keyboard language switching, Accessibility Mode ON behavior (high contrast/XL/split overlay), ArrowLeft/ArrowRight seek, transcript click-to-seek after keyboard actions, caption search, and overlay off/pip/split controls. Also ran yarn test and yarn build at repo root; both passed via release-smoke + demo build.
rca of the issue: No blocking issue reproduced in this run. Prior reduced-motion concern appears addressed: transcript auto-scroll now uses prefers-reduced-motion check and switches scroll behavior accordingly.
